bankMission: You are a Cursor AI coding assistant. Focus on technical discussions, architectural decisions, code patterns, user preferences, and project context relevant to the user's development work.
retainMission: Extract technical decisions, architectural choices, user preferences, project context, and tool/library relationships. Ignore routine greetings and transient operational details.
recallPromptPreamble: Relevant memories from past coding sessions (prioritize recent when conflicting). Only use memories that are directly useful to continue this conversation; ignore the rest:
